(2, 2).title: tile_2_2
(2, 2).description: A mossy alcove beneath a leaning cypress. Claw marks on the stone hint at small creatures living nearby.

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Wooden Arrow
props.description:
A useful device composed of a sharp tip, a shaft of sorts, and fletching. 
This one is made of wood. Wooden arrows are lightweight, so they generally improve accuracy at the cost of impact force. 
They tend to break frequently.
props.announce: Jean notices an arrow on the ground.

props.name: Snookums
props.description: A cute little Mynx.

props.name: Idle
props.description: What?

(3, 2).title: Milo's Space
(3, 2).description: A tidy stone chamber with a standing portal etched in silver runes. The air hums faintly.

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Antidote
props.description:
A murky green fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it restores a small amount of health and 
neutralizes harmful toxins in the bloodstream.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass bottle on the ground with a murky green fluid inside and a label reading, 'Antidote.'

props.name: Passageway
props.description: A passageway leading elsewhere is here.
props.announce: There is a passageway here.

(3, 3).title: Starting Spot
(3, 3).description: A sunlit clearing marked for testing. Paths lead in several directions.

props.name: Gold
props.description: A small pouch containing 50000 gold pieces.
props.announce: There's a small pouch of gold on the ground.

props.name: Antidote
props.description:
A murky green fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it restores a small amount of health and 
neutralizes harmful toxins in the bloodstream.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass bottle on the ground with a murky green fluid inside and a label reading, 'Antidote.'

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Spear
props.description:
A weapon of simple design and great effectiveness. 
Has a longer reach than most melee weapons but is not great at close range.
props.announce: There's a Spear here.

props.name: Scythe
props.description: An unusual weapon that, despite its intimidating appearance, is particularly difficult to wield. Requires two hands.
props.announce: There's a Scythe here.

props.name: Pickaxe
props.description:
A hardy weapon that can also be used to mine for rare metals, if the user is so-inclined. 
Difficult to wield at very close range.
props.announce: There's a Pickaxe here.

props.name: Battleaxe
props.description: A crescent blade affixed to a reinforced wooden haft. It is light and easy to swing.
props.announce: There's a Battleaxe here.

(2, 3).title: tile_2_3
(2, 3).description: A roadside stall draped in colorful cloth. The scent of herbs and tonics hangs in the air.

props.name: Jambo
props.description: A wiry, dark-skinned merchant always wearing an oversized turban and a massive grin.

props.name: Rest
props.description: Rest for a moment to restore fatigue.

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Draught
props.description:
A green fluid giving off a warm, pleasant glow.
Invigorating for any tired adventurer.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass bottle of glowing green fluid on the ground. Its label reads, simply, 'Draught.'

props.name: Antidote
props.description:
A murky green fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it restores a small amount of health and 
neutralizes harmful toxins in the bloodstream.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass bottle on the ground with a murky green fluid inside and a label reading, 'Antidote.'

props.title: Jambo's Shop
props.exit_message: Jambo waves enthusiastically and loudly calls out, 'Jambo wishes you well on your travels and don't forget: When you blue, Jambo Heals U!'

props.name: Burlap Sack
props.description: A large burlap sack containing various medicines.
props.idle_message: A burlap sack is sitting here.
props.announce: A burlap sack is sitting here.

(4, 3).title: tile_4_3
(4, 3).description: A windswept ridge with loose gravel underfoot. You can see far to the east.

props.name: Gold
props.description: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces.
props.announce: There's a small pouch of gold on the ground.

props.name: Draught
props.description:
A green fluid giving off a warm, pleasant glow.
Invigorating for any tired adventurer.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass bottle of glowing green fluid on the ground. Its label reads, simply, 'Draught.'

(5, 3).title: tile_5_3
(5, 3).description: A narrow pass between boulders. Scrapes on the rock suggest frequent traffic.

props.name: Shortbow
props.description:
A reliable missile weapon. Useful as a weak bludgeon at close range.
Requires two hands.
props.announce: There's a Shortbow here.

props.name: Wooden Arrow
props.description:
A useful device composed of a sharp tip, a shaft of sorts, and fletching. 
This one is made of wood. Wooden arrows are lightweight, so they generally improve accuracy at the cost of impact force. 
They tend to break frequently.
props.announce: Jean notices an arrow on the ground.

(5, 4).title: tile_5_4
(5, 4).description: A sheltered hollow beneath an overhang. It's quiet here, and footprints circle the edge.

props.name: Leather Boots
props.description: Durable leather boots treated to resist wear and offer solid protection without much bulk.
props.announce: There's a Leather Boots here.

props.name: Padded Cap
props.description: A cheap cap stuffed with padding. Comfortable but offers only trivial protection.
props.announce: There's a Padded Cap here.

(4, 2).title: Combat Testing Area
(4, 2).description: A dark cavern with dripping water. Strange sounds echo from the shadows.

props.name: Slime Alpha
props.description: Goop that moves. Gross.

props.name: Cave Bat Swooper
props.description: A small, leathery-winged mammal that nests in caverns and ambushes from above.

props.name: Inscription
props.description: Ancient words carved into the stone wall.
props.text: Beware the shadows that lurk in darkness.\nOnly the brave shall pass this threshold.\nSeek the light, and you shall find salvation.

(1, 3).title: Healing Grotto
(1, 3).description: A peaceful grotto with a bubbling spring. The air feels fresh and rejuvenating.

props.name: HealingSpring
props.description: A burbling spring with fresh smelling water. It is clean and very inviting.
props.idle_message: There is a small spring bubbling here.

(1, 2).title: Sacred Shrine
(1, 2).description: A quiet chamber with a beautiful shrine. Candles flicker softly.

props.name: Shrine
props.description: A beautiful shrine depicting a variety of saints praying to God.
props.idle_message: There is an ornate shrine here.

props.name: Offering Box
props.description: A wooden box for offerings and donations.
props.idle_message: An offering box sits near the shrine.

(4, 4).title: Spider's Lair
(4, 4).description: Thick webbing covers the walls and ceiling. The floor is littered with bones.

props.name: Giant Spider Queen
props.description: A humongous spider, covered in black, wiry hairs. It skitters about, looking for its next victim to devour.

props.name: Webbed Chest
props.description: A chest covered in sticky webbing.
props.idle_message: A chest wrapped in webbing sits in the corner.
